'''Pleasant Meadow''' was a marshland region of liquefied gases located at the core of the planet, [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] near the [[Ugnorgrad Swampway]]. The only inhabitants of this region were the colonies of [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaughts]] that fled from [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] during the Imperial occupation and [[Ugnaught rebellion]].

[[3 ABY/Legends|Three years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Pleasant Meadow became the location of a minor skirmish between [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] boarded one of the [[floatboat]] ships operated by the [[Holojournalist/Legends|holojournalist]] news crew for ''[[Action Tidings]]'' and utilized the craft's belt drive as a makeshift weapon with which to repel the Imperial forces. After defeating the Imperials, the Ugnaughts brought Lando to the city of [[Ugnorgrad/Legends|Ugnorgrad]] for an audience with [[King/Legends|King]] [[Ozz (Ugnaught)/Legends|Ozz]].
